reviews.comment: Bought a new 2022 Hyundai Elantra and I took it straight from the dealership to Frederick Window Tinting. I dropped it off rather late and they had it ready first thing the next morning. I am very grateful for them working outside of their store hours to accommodate me and my work schedule. Aside from that nice gesture, the quality of the tint and the application is top tier. I am very pleased with how everything turned out and I will surely be a returning customer for an future tint needs. If you are in the market for new tint you can’t go wrong with Frederick Window Tinting. They are a family oriented business who are very professional and friendly! Thanks again!

reviewReply.comment: We so very much appreciate your kind words! We look forward to having you back again!

reviews.name: accounts/114723450049664810853/locations/10123051285004451502/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHa05xbmZnEAE

reviews.comment:
The short version: if you want to get your car windows tinted, look no further than Frederick Window Tinting. Joe is THE guy.

The extended version: I've been a customer of Frederick Window Tinting for 8, or 9, or has it been ten years (!?!) at this point. Joe has tinted all of my cars, and I've recommended him to numerous friends and family, too. In all honesty, it's worth coming here for just the quality of work Joe produces. You would be hard-pressed to find a bubble, scratch, misalignment, or peeling or fading tint in any job Joe does. Even years later. The materials themselves are top notch. He tinted my Mazda about six years ago, and the film still looks perfect. Joe is a tried-and-true professional, and  I can't say this enough: so, so genuinely stellar at what he does.

But, it's not just how fantastic Joe is at tinting that brings me back time and time again. FWT is a family-run small business that treats me like a part of the family. Sharyn is always responsive to messages, the price is very reasonable, and Joe literally cut a custom sunroof for me once when the pattern wasn't available.

I'm looking forward to bringing my new car in to get tinted as a birthday present to myself in January. I'll post an updated picture as soon as it's done!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you so much Mel! We appreciate you!
